name: Being-H0
source_datasets: UniHand (11 sets incl. OakInk2, EgoDex, HoloAssist)
downloadable: derived-only (checkpoints; UniHand text not released standalone)
license: code MIT; full UniHand corpus license not released
redistribution: n/a (UniHand instruction text not released as a standalone corpus)
suitability: descriptive-only: signature UniHand instruction corpus not independently downloadable
focus_en: A dexterous VLA pretrained from large-scale human hand videos via physical instruction tuning and part-level hand-motion tokenization, building the UniHand corpus.
focus_cn: 通过物理指令微调与部件级手部动作分词，从大规模人类手部视频预训练的灵巧 VLA，并构建 UniHand 语料。
datapath_en: Being-H0 is pretrained on UniHand, a corpus the authors assemble from 11 human-video sources (including OakInk2, EgoDex and HoloAssist) spanning motion capture, VR and RGB-only footage with task instructions. It applies physical instruction tuning and tokenizes hand motion at the part level via grouped residual quantization, so a multimodal model learns to follow instructions at hand-level dexterity. It releases checkpoints; the full UniHand instruction text is not published as a standalone, independently downloadable corpus.
datapath_cn: Being-H0 在 UniHand 上预训练，该语料由作者从 11 个人类视频来源（包括 OakInk2、EgoDex 与 HoloAssist）汇编而成，涵盖动作捕捉、VR 与纯 RGB 画面并带有任务指令。它采用物理指令微调，通过分组残差量化在部件级对手部动作分词，使多模态模型学会在手部级灵巧度上跟随指令。它发布检查点；完整的 UniHand 指令文本未作为独立可下载语料发布。
flow_en: UniHand human hand videos + instructions (11 sources)
physical instruction tuning of a VLA
flow_cn: UniHand 人类手部视频 + 指令（11 个来源）
物理空间对齐 + 后训练
no_corpus_en: Being-H0 builds the UniHand instruction corpus internally but releases only model checkpoints; the assembled instruction text (which mixes 11 source licenses) is not published as a standalone downloadable dataset. With no independently retrievable corpus, this atlas documents Being-H0 descriptively rather than clustering its strings.
no_corpus_cn: Being-H0 在内部构建了 UniHand 指令语料，但仅发布模型检查点；其汇编的指令文本（混合 11 个来源的许可）未作为独立可下载数据集发布。由于没有可独立获取的语料，本图谱以描述性方式记录 Being-H0，而非对其字符串进行聚类。
example_caption_en: Being-H0 is pretrained on large-scale egocentric human hand videos from UniHand; the project page shows hand-motion data and robot manipulation rollouts.
example_caption_cn: Being-H0 在来自 UniHand 的大规模第一人称人类手部视频上预训练；项目主页展示了手部动作数据与机器人操作执行。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2507.15597, beingbeyond.github.io/Being-H0, github.com/BeingBeyond/Being-H0, and huggingface.co/BeingBeyond/Being-H0.
citation: Luo et al., Being-H0: Vision-Language-Action Pretraining from Large-Scale Human Videos, arXiv 2025 (arXiv:2507.15597).
